name: Siga Wot
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb beef chuck, cut into half-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
Siga wot is a spiced beef stew.
1. In a dry pan over moderate heat, stir fry the onions for 4 minutes to reduce their bulk, stirring constantly.
2. Add the oil and continue frying for about 1 minute longer.
3. Add the chow and tomato paste, then continue frying until the flavors are well combined.
4. Incorporate the salt and one-fourth of the water into the mixture. Stir well to ensure even distribution.
5. Add the beef cubes and the remaining water. Cover the pan and cook for 45 minutes, or until the beef is tender. There should be a moderate amount of sauce.
6. Serve warm with Injeera.
